info.name: Twilio - Microvisor
info.description:
This is the public Twilio REST API.

Contact Support:
 Name: Twilio Support
 Email: support@twilio.com

variable.description: (Required) A 34-character string that uniquely identifies this Device.

request.description: Fetch a specific Device.

response.name: OK

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: basic

urlencoded.description: A unique and addressable name to be assigned to this Device by the developer. It may be used in place of the Device SID.
The SID or unique name of the App to be targeted to the Device.
A Boolean flag specifying whether to enable application logging. Logs will be enabled or extended for 24 hours.
Set to true to restart the App running on the Device.

variable.description: (Required) A 34-character string that uniquely identifies this Device.

response.name: OK

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: basic

urlencoded.description: A unique and addressable name to be assigned to this Device by the developer. It may be used in place of the Device SID.
The SID or unique name of the App to be targeted to the Device.
A Boolean flag specifying whether to enable application logging. Logs will be enabled or extended for 24 hours.
Set to true to restart the App running on the Device.
